web_sources.query: EIA Strait of Hormuz oil LNG flows 2024 2025
web_sources.robots_risk: public web page; robots not interpreted by this import.
web_sources.summary: EIA reports 20 million barrels per day of oil and petroleum products transited the Strait of Hormuz in 2024; about 69% of that crude and condensate went to Asian markets, and LNG flows through Hormuz averaged 11 Bcf/d.
web_sources.title: The Strait of Hormuz is the world's most important oil transit chokepoint
